_comment: Pool of GitHub PATs the proxy rotates through. Each pool has its own clientKeys (= what callers must put in their Authorization: Bearer header). Multiple pools are useful when you want completely separate quotas for different teams.

pools._comment_clientKeys: Caller-side keys. The proxy itself doesn't validate these against any directory — it just routes the request to whichever pool matches. Empty array = single-tenant deploy, anyone hitting the proxy goes to defaultPool.
pools._comment_accounts: Each account holds one GitHub PAT. Provide either token (raw string) or tokenFile (path; supports ~). disabled=true takes the account out of routing without removing it from the file.
